description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, rectangular design with a combination of wood grain and smooth, light-colored panels on the front. The left side of the front has a large sliding door with a wood finish, while the right side is divided into two sections with lighter panels, one of which includes a horizontal handle for a drawer or compartment. The sides and top are finished in a matching wood grain, giving the piece a cohesive look. The back panel is made of a different, unfinished wood composite material, typical for furniture backs. The handles are simple, metallic bars, adding a contemporary touch. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces.
description: A modern wardrobe with wood grain and light-colored panel doors, featuring metallic bar handles and a sturdy, rectangular build.
description_view_0: Front view showing two-tone doors, a sliding wood panel, and metallic bar handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain finish and the wardrobe's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing an unfinished wood composite back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a continuous wood grain finish and no visible handles or panels.
